selected_issue.title: tools/replay_verification_assess.py reported only aggregate violation totals, not per-reason counts needed for diagnosis

why_it_outranked_alternatives: Current evidence showed no unresolved rank 1-4 issues: structural violations were zero, canonical tests passed, replay mismatch signals were absent, and diagnostic violation totals were zero. The highest unresolved bounded issue was rank 5 missing instrumentation: replay summary lacked per-reason violation distributions needed for fast root-cause localization when failures occur.

checks.command: python3 probe for replay summary reason-count keys

files_changed.change: Added per-reason count aggregation for structural, behavioral, and invariant violations.
Added required schema properties for structural/behavioral/invariant violation reason-count maps.
Added assertions for new reason-count fields and reason-count sum consistency against violation totals.

validation_performed.result: summary now includes structural_violation_reason_counts, behavioral_violation_reason_counts, invariant_violation_reason_counts
canonical raw replay summary remains clean and includes new reason-count fields

before_after_evidence.before: Replay validation summary included only aggregate violation totals and omitted per-reason distributions.
before_after_evidence.after: Replay validation summary now includes structural_violation_reason_counts, behavioral_violation_reason_counts, and invariant_violation_reason_counts for direct reason-level diagnosis.

unresolved_risks: Current canonical fixtures have zero violations, so reason-count maps are empty on baseline fixtures.
Reason-count usefulness depends on stable upstream reason-code naming consistency.
stop_reason: Selected rank-5 instrumentation gap fixed with minimal changes and repeated validation; additional analytics expansion would exceed bounded single-issue scope.
